name: ccx
description: Automated dev loops with Codex review gates. Provides /ccx:loop, /ccx:forever, /ccx:supervisor (parallel worker orchestrator with autonomous chat_ask answering, scope-overlap gating, stuck-exit auto-revise, and model tier escalation — 5-rung ladder haiku→sonnet→opus→opus-xhigh→opus-max driven by --max-attempts / --worker-loops / --start-tier), /ccx:plan (seeds BOARD.md task rows from a prompt or document), and an optional Discord chat bridge (/ccx:chat-setup + --chat).
